daily.today_energy: Mercury's vibes are hitting different today—you're in that sweet spot between grounded and inspired. Perfect energy for manifesting something you've been thinking about but haven't acted on yet.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or solo, there's a softness in the air around your heart. If you've been hesitant to reach out to someone, the universe is basically giving you a gentle nudge. Trust your gut.
daily.career: Your practical energy is amplified rn. This is your moment to handle those tasks you've been procrastinating on. People are actually noticing your effort today—even if it doesn't feel obvious to you.
daily.health: Your body's asking for something nourishing and slow today. Skip the intense workout if it doesn't feel right; a walk or stretching session will do wonders for your mental clarity and peace.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to slow down and actually listen to what your gut's been trying to tell you. Mercury's moving in your favor, making it easier to express yourself authentically. Trust the vibe shifts.
weekly.love: If you're coupled up, deeper conversations are flowing naturally—don't shy away from vulnerability. Single? Someone's noticing your energy. Either way, be honest about what you actually want, not what looks good.
weekly.career: Your ideas are hitting different right now. This is prime time to pitch that project or ask for what you deserve. You've got the momentum; just remember patience still matters more than rushing.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for grounding practices—think long walks, stretching, or just sitting outside. Sleep quality matters more than gym intensity this week. Listen when you need rest.
